description: Averroes devoted his life to recovering the authentic Aristotle. He wrote three levels of commentary on virtually every Aristotelian text, and medieval Europe knew him simply as 'The Commentator' — with Aristotle as 'The Philosopher'. The relationship was one of total intellectual dedication.
source: Averroes, Commentaries on Aristotle; Leaman, O. - Averroes and his Philosophy (1988)
